invalid.title: Invalid route
invalid.message: The app or room is missing from the URL.

master.title: Master (on air)
master.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Enable it in your browser to broadcast.
master.note: The master publishes audio only over WebRTC; listeners subscribe (without publishing). It's low-latency fan-out via LiveKit, with no egress.

monitor.title: Listener monitor
monitor.note: This is what your listeners hear (live audio + counter). This monitor counts as one listener while it's open.

share.title: Share / embed
share.note: The embed is an audio-only player with autoplay after a gesture, a LIVE badge and a listener count. Paste it anywhere.

errors.noToken: The server did not return a valid publish token.
errors.connLost: Connection to the room was lost.
